---
title: Historic Zoning Map Dashboard
description: Historic zoning maps for Massachusetts Greater Boston cities and towns.
author: Nicholas Chiumenti
date: 3/10/2026
categories: [dashboard]
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---


<iframe
  src="https://ruraldevelopment.maps.arcgis.com/apps/dashboards/71b650adca7f4b63972a174044ebd54b"
  width="100%"
  height="600px"
  style="border:none;"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
